original_title: C++ User Defined Literals not supported
original_body:
C++ User Defined Literals not supported
The code as below

```cpp
namespace units::si {

inline constexpr auto planck_constant = 6.62607015e-34q_J * 1q_s;

}
```

causes the following error:

```
WARNING: Invalid definition: Expected end of definition. [error at 58]
[build]   constexpr auto units::si::planck_constant = 6.62607015e-34q_J * 1q_s
[build]   ----------------------------------------------------------^
```

According to <https://github.com/sphinx-doc/sphinx/blob/3.x/sphinx/domains/cpp.py#L4770> Sphinx seems to not have features for UDLs. Could you please add those?
enhanced_title: Support for C++ User Defined Literals (UDLs) in Sphinx documentation
enhanced_body:
## Problem Description
Sphinx's C++ domain does not support User Defined Literals (UDLs), causing documentation builds to fail when attempting to document C++ code that uses this feature.

## Current Behavior
When documenting C++ code containing User Defined Literals, Sphinx generates a warning and fails to properly parse the code:

```
WARNING: Invalid definition: Expected end of definition. [error at 58]
[build]   constexpr auto units::si::planck_constant = 6.62607015e-34q_J * 1q_s
[build]
